name: Harry Potter
description:
~~ He bumped into you ~~

My first Harry Potter bot finally, I LOVE Harry Potter, I'm completely addicted to the movies and books, so yes, that means I'm probably going to make bots for almost all the characters... Okay, it's an exaggeration on my part, not all of them, but a good part.

I focused a lot on the book's personality for this bot, I just don't know if it will stick with that.

The introduction is the usual one, there’s no sexual or violent content, the bot takes place in the fourth year, a little before the Yule Ball. I won’t use a specific house POV, I don't see the point.
creator: Max o mais legal
